podcasts.name: The Ecom Academy
podcasts.title: NEW Claude Design + Klaviyo: You can do full interactive designs inside Claude #shorts
podcasts.transcript: Claude Design is actually a web-based app and you head to claude.ai/design. This is a really cool app. It's only recently been released by Claude and it allows you to do full interactive designs directly in here just with a prompt. We can take example designs and put it in here and get it to build your own designs based on that. So, the best place to get design inspiration from, especially if you're not a designer like me, is a website called mil.com. And this is it here. Basically what MIL is is a library of all the emails that have been sent by huge brands [music] and you create an account on mil and then you follow some brands and then you get to see all the emails that [music] they sent. Right? So I've got an account here and I've I've followed through a few brands like IMA, AG1, Nespresso, Nike, those sort of brands there. They're ones that that I like that I think is a good representation of my brand. But if you want to find your own brands, you just pop in here and you know, let's see if we've got some like Kylie Cosmetics. [music] You could add that in there and have a look at her emails and you basically get uh a full design degree on their emails, right?
